channel.title: Download free software, update daily!

item.title: Download HDD Low Level Format Tool 5.5

The program supports many different interfaces, including IDE, S-ATA, SAS, SCSI, FireWire, USB, etc HDD Low Level Format Tool works with hard drives from many different manufacturers, including Hitachi, Fujitsu, Samsung, Quantum, Maxtor, Seagate, Toshiba, IBM, Western Digital and many other companies. item.title: Download JSoft PDF Reducer 8.3
item.description: JSoft PDF Reducer is a software application designed to compress and reduce the size of PDF files. The program provides many features and tools to optimize PDF files, such as removing unused objects, compressing images, and removing bookmarks and annotations. You are also allowed to rearrange, delete pages, add or remove text, and secure your PDF files with Watermarks, passwords and digital signatures. It's set up in a wizard format, so you'll be guided through the steps. Features of...

item.title: Download FastFlix 6.2.1
item.description: FastFlix is a simple and user-friendly GUI for video encoding. The application has a user-friendly GUI that includes all the necessary tools and configuration options for video encoding. FastFlix provides support for a variety of formats, including MP4, MKV, MOV, M4V, AVI, DIVX, WebM, MPG, MP2, MPEG, OGG, MOV, M4P, FLV, and more. item.title: Download Devious Machines Duck 2.0.26
item.description: Devious Machines Duck is a dynamic processor plugin designed to control the volume of a track or a specific audio signal in a mix. It is often used for "ducking" effects, where one sound source automatically lowers the volume when another source is present. Ducking is often used in music production and audio post-production to create space in a mix, emphasize certain elements, or prevent frequencies from clashing. Duck has a sidechain input that allows you to trigger volume reduction...

item.title: Download ProtonVPN 4.3.13
item.description: ProtonVPN app for Windows is the best way to stay safe and private while surfing the internet. It is open source, easy to use, and packed with useful security features. ProtonVPN will secure your connection by routing your traffic through multiple servers to protect you against advanced network-based attacks. It helps keep your IP address safe if something goes wrong with your VPN connection. If your VPN connection fails, the kill switch feature will prevent your device from connecting...
